MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Appoint Jack Urich, Ii, As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff and moving party Jack Urich.

RULING: PLAINTIFF JACK URICH NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO APPOINT JACK URICH, II, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO, AND SUBSTITUTE SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST FOR, DECEASED PLAINTIFF AND FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

No opposition and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to appoint Jack Urich, II, as successor-in-interest, and substitute successor-in-interest for, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
